active_sprint.sprint_goal: Replace the simplistic 'is_numeric' column with a more robust, multi-class 'answer_type' column ('text', 'numeric', 'year', 'date') to enable advanced answer-checking logic.

next_steps.description: Create and unit test the 'classify_answer_type' helper function in a self-contained way.
Apply the new function to the baseline static dataset to create the 'answer_type' column, remove 'is_numeric', and save as a new version.
Integrate the 'classify_answer_type' function into the data ingestion pipeline for all new questions.

key_decisions_log.decision: Decided to implement the 'answer_type' feature now using a rule-based approach, rather than waiting for Phase 2 with Sentence-BERT, as it's critical for the MVP's answer-checking logic and Sentence-BERT is the wrong tool for syntactic classification.

future_work_log.phase_2_nlp: The full Sentence-BERT model will be used for semantic tasks like similarity scoring and semantic answer checking, not for data type classification.

schema_notes.main_dataframe: The 'is_numeric' boolean column is now deprecated and will be replaced by the 'answer_type' categorical column.
